failures.reason: PHR was marked as an enabled pilot in registry and kernel-product.yaml, but bootstrap providers did not evaluate product-local healthcare gate packs and the web validate surface fell back to lint.

Local Docker Buildx builders report EOF / Docker daemon unavailable. The docker-buildx adapter now fails preflight with docker-buildx-builder-unavailable instead of timing out or reporting fake success.
failures.expiry: retry after Docker Desktop daemon and Buildx builders are healthy
